properties.after-effects: Oral: 6-12 hours | Insufflated: 4-8 hours | Vapourized: 2-5 hours.
properties.duration: Oral: 3-6 hours | Insufflated: 2-5 hours. | Vapourized: 0.5-1.5 hours.
properties.onset: Oral: 15-45 minutes. | Insufflated: 5-10 minutes | Vapourized: 1-2 minutes.
properties.summary: Stimulant of the pyrrolidinophenone class that is a higher homologue of α-PHP. Reportedly less potent and less effects.
